title: Fix viewport fill on mobile and tablets

testFiles.description: Tests for viewport fill behavior on mobile and tablets — canvas CSS sizing, backing store scaling, orientation changes, visualViewport API, and listener cleanup

tests.description: Canvas CSS size equals viewport dimensions regardless of resolutionScale
tests.acceptanceCriteria: Resolution scaling does not shrink the canvas element's CSS size

tests.description: Canvas backing store (canvas.width) equals viewport width times effectivePixelRatio
tests.acceptanceCriteria: Resolution scaling does not shrink the canvas element's CSS size

tests.description: Orientation change event triggers resize and updates dimensions
visualViewport resize event triggers canvas resize when API available
tests.acceptanceCriteria: Visual output fills the viewport on mobile and desktop

tests.description: Resize handler cleanup removes all listeners (resize, orientationchange, visualViewport)
Resize handler maintains CSS size at 100% after resolutionScale application
tests.acceptanceCriteria: Resolution scaling does not shrink the canvas element's CSS size

tests.description: Resize with visualViewport uses viewport dimensions, not window.innerWidth
tests.acceptanceCriteria: Visual output fills the viewport on mobile and desktop

tests.description: initScene applies canvas CSS style overrides after setSize to prevent layout shrinkage
tests.acceptanceCriteria: Visual output fills the viewport on mobile and desktop

testFiles.description: Tests for CSS viewport rules — dvh units, safe-area-inset on buttons, and viewport-fit meta tag

tests.description: style.css uses dvh units with vh fallback for html and body height
tests.acceptanceCriteria: Visual output fills the viewport on mobile and desktop

tests.description: UI buttons use safe-area-inset for notched device support
tests.acceptanceCriteria: UI buttons remain reachable and not clipped
UI buttons remain reachable and not clipped
